headline: Baron Asset Fund Sold Bio-Techne Corporation (TECH) Due to Concerns Over Potential Impact of AI
summary: Baron Capital, an investment management company, released its Q1 2026 investor letter for the “Baron Asset Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. U.S. equity markets started the year on a positive note. In February, market dynamics changed due to concerns about AI disruption, accelerated by U.S. and Israeli military action in […]

headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock Worth Investigating and 2 We Turn Down
summary: While strong cash flow is a key indicator of stability, it doesn’t always translate to superior returns. Some cash-heavy businesses struggle with inefficient spending, slowing demand, or weak competitive positioning.
